textByHashes.928fe73c5904971d2da379930aaa52a65ab19e46: Hello citizen, how can I help?
textByHashes.7e7f851f0297efb61cda0a3a7ddc5486e637971e: I don't know if you can help us!
textByHashes.7795d4c355abf69b64a3d1a7907d7c5262b8853a: The trolls have taken up camp on Death Plateau! They are using it to launch raids at night on the village. We have tried to attack the camp but the main path is heavily guarded!
textByHashes.9807ad85919e5e4f1ff224dcf6c7f279660f9cbf: If there is another way I do not know of it.
textByHashes.e4f873eff6f385a43564421fcf015d1835d4226e: Do you know of such a path?
textByHashes.2f9fdce35dfcc402131e2adaa54ba695ff03d02b: Citizen you would be well rewarded!
textByHashes.2f38de723d806ef294947ad817a797682427dcb3: If you go up to Death Plateau be very careful as the trolls will attack you on sight!
textByHashes.cbca97c2d4b07f3ef0da049fbb87445591569046: All of our equipment is kept in the castle on the hill.
textByHashes.8abde415a38610e0cdaa845dd7fdfe204ffbecfe: The stupid guard that was on duty last night lost the combination to the lock! I told the Prince that the Imperial Guard should've been in charge of security!
textByHashes.72b273627cc7d94e053ece48382a6f78e185470e: The equipment room is unlocked when the stone balls are placed in the correct order on the stone mechanism outside it. The right order is written on a piece of paper the guard had.
textByHashes.a5645b9569f017cc2a00a7780e8df8b80f428009: Well citizen, the Prince is fond of puzzles. Why we couldn't just have a key is beyond me!
textByHashes.e8f390d56d55f19a9c435b4a15031a4efc754a6a: Can I assist you with anything else?
textByHashes.44eced6876becb005a63f9d333769750e3223e47: Welcome to the Principality of Burthorpe!
textByHashes.4b2ebe516a7f250ac7a3f8f85740aed92c4c6582: We are the Imperial Guard for his Royal Highness Prince Anlaf of Burthorpe.
textByHashes.d3123ffa0620356ecfd0f0971006573729d685e7: Hello citizen, is there anything you'd like to know?
textByHashes.0fed2de96c9fa91151de183db3726a98006e470a: You offered to see if you could find another way up Death Plateau. We could then use it to sneak up and attack the trolls by night.
textByHashes.1ff0a87c0b0a01a6aaade66d775024cb384babc1: That's right citizen, you offered to recover the combination and unlock the door.
textByHashes.f7825bc280cfc4da41b81005709c51930aabd952: Is there anything else you would like to know?
textByHashes.152a1507333f13b96f9050a3ff53f38eba4d2cd5: You are right citizen. The White Knights have taken advantage of the old and weak king, they control most of Asgarnia, including Falador. However they do not control Burthorpe!
textByHashes.3aca0e1233d3d406ec352562575b6bd40ed4952b: We are the prince's elite troops! We keep Burthorpe secure!
textByHashes.5ab9f6d43d34b3bbbfe0950a2471a269a822b75c: The White Knights have overlooked us, until now! They are pouring money into their war against the Black Knights, they are looking for an excuse to stop our funding and I'm afraid they may have found it!
textByHashes.abd38a409d441a21dafc3636e1b891df840d8768: If we can not destroy the troll camp on Death Plateau then the Imperial Guard will be disbanded and Burthorpe will come under control of the White Knights. We can not let this happen!
textByHashes.7721cb1555e272db98e8a97de3faff78f29f63a7: Hello citizen, have you found another way up Death Plateau?
textByHashes.ea80da886dc70e9751b476a4c4b3bc56ad506e7b: I have heard of Dunstan's son, he is a very promising young man. For the sake of your mission we can make an exception!
textByHashes.732dbe42838874a6aaf0a5357e74e18a80a24add: This certificate proves that we have accepted Dunstan's son for training in the Imperial Guard!
textByHashes.5f078bccbb8e64920bfab4537abf8a764ae6f64a: Hello citizen, have you found the secret way up Death Plateau?
textByHashes.5cc1fd07a6b80ff82094df79abdfbc818168d93e: No problem, I have a duplicate.
textByHashes.874025fc88650180617721265e5da5aa0d3a4773: Excellent, this looks perfect. They will never see us coming.
textByHashes.12f323b325f99b8479ec344ce99c5cb221280c5f: Have you managed to open the equipment room?
textByHashes.3319f3aa7695a8c4bc19f388b7d53caea5399eac: Well done citizen! We will reward you by training you in attack!
textByHashes.9b72c12c06dea442a52aadd04211350c01ca333f: Hello citzen, I have the map of the secret way you gave me earlier.
textByHashes.589cf7ae932bf7a3dee3cd01742ba3ed1dc72eda: I have the combination to the equipment room that you recovered for me.
textByHashes.01d731398f0b33e2900643e1c850c5128c3b6045: With all due respect, how can we be sure that this is the work of a dragonkin? I trust as much as anyone, but what if there was a mistake?
textByHashes.66947fd1d73f7a1052c9d489ba3998d1b86c2c20: As much as I hate to agree with a White Knight, he's right. We need to work together if we are going to survive.
textByHashes.101c9c02a58962ca6580ab8d0c58625898c4596d: He's right. This is the only option.
textByHashes.82e169a05a2da2dbd03b09d7a4a0f2b5814a4c09: I'm afraid I have bad news. We made our attack as planned, but we met unexpected resistance.
textByHashes.c5c6ca219377ae92f2250b3c3b09fb8da39b0438: We were ambushed by trolls coming from the north. They captured Dunstan's son, Godric, who we enlisted at your request; we tried to follow but we were repelled at the foot of their stronghold.
textByHashes.853829641ffe7ff7db56f08b20795d2cbeef9813: The way to the stronghold is treacherous, friend. Even if you manage to climb your way up, there will be many trolls defending the stronghold.
textByHashes.5df615ae4d75070424b4c8a7f90c6e6b34649762: God speed friend! I would send some of my men with you, but none of them are brave enough to follow.
textByHashes.8f64fddf58283248c13bad004fed7542a5c91734: How are you getting on with rescuing Godric?
textByHashes.05411e7e8d3ef88a5c5e200bd4a9db2895fe7741: Hurry, friend! Who knows what they'll do with Godric?
textByHashes.ab502fafea4bdfbfc2f0b8c86b28e22d50e53c98: Hurry, friend. Find a way to free Godric!
textByHashes.5cf5c3f827103e6e6e809868f85cbb28f4ca9d8a: Oh, what great news! You should hurry to tell Dunstan, he will be overjoyed!
textByHashes.80af7d5e5a8dc28d15c023d037120e4d863c8684: Well citizen, the Prince is fond of puzzles. Why he couldn't just have a key is beyond me!
textByHashes.648d353fe1bfaec8d0717eb7e83a1529b673402a: We were ambushed by trolls coming from the north. They captured Dunstan's son, Godric, who we enlisted at your request, we tried to follow but we were repelled at the foot of their stronghold.
textByHashes.c47cc27565ed30a4e17e7e9f8329b9ea66e7d0cb: The way tto the stronghold is treacherous, friend. Even if you manage to climb your way up, there will be many trolls defending the stronghold.
textByHashes.b93134140ced43963b7b4d6f59c95af7ba003744: God speed friend! I would send some of my me with you, but none of them are brave enough to follow.
textByHashes.4c741cb3b3064b2b513d5e4237e1a20c7d35ab31: We are busy preparing for an attack by night. Godric knows of a secret entrance to the stronghold. Once we destroy the stronghold Burthorpe will be safe! Friend, we are indebted to you!
